creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
Hi!

I've though about this, and I would rather suggest creating a subport 
for the purpose of installing all header files. According to postgresql 
docs, they will take up a couple of megabytes, which makes it too much 
to install by default, and I cannot allow the port to get more 
complicated to maintain again. A subport should be pretty straight 
forward, defining itself as a POSTGRESQL_SUBPORT and including 
CURDIR/../postgresql7/Makefile and setting the 
INSTALL_TARGET=install-all-headers and do-build: ${DO_NADA}

Would you be interested in creating and maintaing that port?

Regards,
Palle
